submission_methods.reasoning: All sources consistently list portal as recommended/fastest, fax as alternative, and phone for urgent/status. Provider manual states 'CignaforHCP Portal... Recommended for fastest processing'

fax_number.reasoning: Phone rep explicitly stated new dedicated infusion line: 'For infusion drugs specifically, we have a new dedicated line: (800) 768-4700. The old 4695 number still works but it goes to the general medical PA queue, so it's slower.' Change effective January 2026. Denial letter confirms dedicated infusion line exists at 4700.

superseded_values.reason: Superseded January 2026 - now goes to slower general medical PA queue per phone rep

portal_url.reasoning: Consistent across all sources. Phone rep and provider manual both specify full URL. Web page confirms same URL. Denial letter references 'CignaforHCP' portal which maps to same URL.

phone_status_only.reasoning: Phone number consistent across all sources. IVR path from phone transcript: 'For healthcare providers, press 2' then 'For prior authorization status, press 1'. Appeals use Option 4.

phone_urgent.reasoning: Same number used for urgent submissions. Provider manual states 'For urgent requests or status checks'. Phone rep confirmed 'If you have something urgent, call us and we'll flag it.'

phone_hours.reasoning: Identical specification in provider manual and web page. No contradictory information in other sources.

pa_form.reasoning: Phone rep explicitly stated: 'use the new one, CG-PA-002, not the old 001'. Denial letter confirms: 'Effective January 2026, infusion drug precertifications require the updated form CG-PA-002. The new form includes required biosimilar attestation fields.'

superseded_values.reason: Superseded January 2026 per phone rep and denial letter

selected_value: Diagnostic test results supporting the diagnosis
Prior treatment history (required for all biologic medications)
required_documents.reasoning: Core documents consistent across sources. Chart note window updated from 60 to 90 days per phone rep and denial letter. All sources require diagnostic results, treatment plan, and prior treatment history for biologics.

chart_note_window_days.reasoning: Phone rep explicitly stated: 'chart notes within 90 days — we updated that recently, used to be 60. That's outdated. It's 90 days as of January 2026.' Denial letter confirms: 'outside the 90-day documentation window (updated from 60 days per January 2026 policy revision)'

superseded_values.reason: Updated to 90 days January 2026 per phone rep and denial letter

lab_window_days.reasoning: No specific lab results window mentioned in any source. Only general 'diagnostic test results' requirement without timeframe specified.

turnaround_standard_days.reasoning: Phone rep stated current operational reality: 'Standard is supposed to be 7 business days but right now it's more like 10-12 because of the system migration.' This reflects actual current turnaround vs. stated policy.

superseded_values.reason: Current operational turnaround longer due to system migration per phone rep March 2026

turnaround_portal_days.reasoning: No portal-specific turnaround time mentioned in any source. Phone rep noted portal issues due to migration but no specific timeframe given.

turnaround_fax_days.reasoning: Web page specifies 'Processing time: 7-10 business days' for fax. Provider manual states similar range. No contradictory fax-specific timing in other sources.

turnaround_urgent_hours.reasoning: Consistent across all sources. Phone rep confirmed: 'Urgent is still 24 hours though. If you have something urgent, call us and we'll flag it.'

pend_period_days.reasoning: No auto-denial deadline mentioned in any source for incomplete submissions.

appeal_fax.reasoning: Provider manual and denial letter both specify (800) 768-4699. Web page shows (800) 768-4695 but this appears to be an error as that's the old PA fax number.

superseded_values.reason: Web page error - this is the old PA fax number, not appeals fax

appeal_phone.reasoning: Provider manual and denial letter both specify 'Option 4' for appeals. Web page shows same number but missing the Option 4 specification.

appeal_deadline_days.reasoning: Denial letter explicitly states: 'Appeals must be filed within 60 days.'

appeal_mail.reasoning: No mailing address provided in any source for written appeals.

system_migration_in_progress.reasoning: Phone rep explicitly stated: 'we're in the middle of migrating to a new system. The old portal still works but it's been glitchy.' Web page notice confirms: 'We are currently migrating our prior authorization system.'

common_denial_reasons.reasoning: No specific denial reasons with percentages mentioned in sources.

coverage_states.reasoning: No state-specific coverage information provided in sources.

step_therapy_required.reasoning: Provider manual explicitly states: 'Requires documentation of conventional therapy failure.' Web page extraction shows false but raw text does not contradict the manual requirement.

prior_treatment_failure_required.reasoning: Provider manual states: 'Requires documentation of conventional therapy failure' which indicates prior treatment failure requirement.

biosimilar_requirement.reasoning: Provider manual states: 'NOTE: Effective 2025, biosimilar preferred for new starts'. Web page confirms: 'Biosimilar preferred for new starts effective July 2025'

preferred_biosimilars.reasoning: No specific biosimilar drug names mentioned in any source.
